# availableProperties

**Instance Property**

A set of available properties that a device provides.

## Declaration

```swift
var availableProperties: Set<CMIOExtensionProperty> { get }
```

## Discussion

Don’t change the state of this property during the life cycle of the associated device.

## Managing Properties

- **deviceProperties(forProperties:)**: Retrieves the state of device properties.
- **setDeviceProperties(_:)**: Sets the state of device properties.
